title: Hammers Galore
description: This mod adds a variety of practical hammer tools to the game.
body:
This mod adds a variety of practical hammer tools to the game.

Hammer Types
- Basic mineral hammers using vanilla ores

Special Hammers
- Nether Star Hammer: Increases attack damage and mining speed when durability is low
- Heart of the Sea Hammer: Removes underwater mining penalty when submerged
- Conduit Hammer: Grants Conduit Power when underwater
- Ender Hammer: Mined items are teleported directly into your inventory
- Magma Hammer: Automatically smelts mined ores
- Piston Hammer: Grants super knockback
- Glass Hammer: Only 1 durability but deals massive attack damage
- Sculk Hammer: Turns mined blocks directly into experience orbs
- Emerald Hammer: Grants Luck based on remaining durability

Configuration Options:
- Area mining range: 3x3/5x5/7x7/9x9, set to 1 to disable (default: 3x3)
- Require sneaking for area mining (default: enabled)
- Extra durability cost per additional block mined (default: 1)
- Extra hunger cost for area mining (default: 1)
- Toggle settings for special hammer abilities

=========================================================

本模组为游戏添加了多种实用的锤子工具。

锤子类型
- 原版矿物基础锤子

特殊锤子
- 下界之星锤：耐久低时增加攻击力和挖掘速度
- 海洋之心锤：处在水里时，可以直接无视水下挖掘惩罚
- 潮涌之锤：处在水里时，获得潮涌能量
- 末影锤：挖掘的物品直接进入背包
- 岩浆锤：挖掘的矿物直接烧炼
- 活塞锤：超级击退
- 玻璃锤：1点耐久但是攻击力巨高
- 幽匿锤：挖掘的方块直接变成经验掉落
- 绿宝石锤：根据耐久度给予幸运效果

配置更改：
- 范围挖掘3x3/5x5/7x7和9x9，设置为 1 禁用(默认3x3)
- 使用此锤子进行范围挖掘时是否需要潜行(默认开启)
- 挖掘时每个额外方块消耗的耐久(默认1)
- 使用此锤子进行范围挖掘时是否消耗额外的饱食度(默认1)
- 特殊锤子的功能设置
